signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell confirms in Jan 29 speech that most tariff effects on goods prices have already passed through economy
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell confirms in Jan 29 speech that most tariff effects on goods prices have already passed through economy as one-time increase, with core PCE inflation now just above 2% excluding tariffs and services showing disinflation | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
